title: Pixelmon: Ultron
description: Explore the vast area of the pokemon world!
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Pixelmon_Ultron/BH_PmonU_header.webp)
![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Pixelmon_Ultron/BH_PmonU_overview.webp)
new pixelmon modpack! Catch all pokemon in awesome world of pokemon! Also, beat all 8 gym leaders and catch amazing pokemon called: "legendary pokemon!". Furthermore, you have a bunch of vast biomes to explore! In the brand new pixelmon modpack you will be able to go through strange portals called: "Ultra Rifts", have fun! And remember Gotta Catch 'Em All!

 

 

my official pixelmon ultron server is available! You will find my server by clicking on the "Multiplayer" button in the game menu.

 

Partnered with Mantle.gg

Mantle.gg is an amazing way to show off your favorite cosmetics purchasable from the store!
![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Pixelmon_Ultron/BH_PmonU_features.webp)

                                                          **1000+ Pokémon**

                                                               **Gyms**

                                                           **Shiny Pokémon**
                                                           
                                                 **Mega Evolution, Z-Moves and Dynamax**

                                                            **Pokémon TCG**
                                                              
                                                         **Legendary Pokémon**

                                                             **Poké Loot**
                                                               
                                                 **My Pixelmon Ultron Official Server**
